description: Create an offline reference library for agricultural inspections by saving the following web pages to /home/ga/Documents/offline_references/: USDA Farming Topics (https://www.usda.gov/topics/farming), EPA Agricultural Regulations (https://www.epa.gov/agriculture), and NASS Quick Stats (https://www.nass.usda.gov/Quick_Stats/). Generate a reference index file at /home/ga/Documents/offline_references/index.txt containing the header 'Offline Field Reference Library' and, for each page, the title, original URL, local filename, and a 1-2 sentence description of its contents.
